rule: relation contracts are explicit and complete before execution
predicate witness ledger covers all candidate ids
excluded rows retain no adapter outcomes
counted rows carry predicate hashes and adapter outcomes
holdout split is hash-based and covers all relation families
candidate admission is computed before counted/rejected aggregation
predicate block does not read generated result ledgers or adapter outcomes
source provenance separates upstream, native, stress, and generated strata
deployed-tool comparison is a bounded nearest-neighbor crosswalk
predicate status is recomputed rather than trusting generator labels
